title: inga vera subsp. spuria
intro: Inga vera subsp. spuria, also known as the Inga tree or Guanacaste, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Inga vera subsp. spuria include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and address specific health issues.
